allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('data',{}\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\),int\) else len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\),list\) else d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -File | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem *.json | ForEach-Object { $size = $_.Length; $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $keys = \($content | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name -join '\\'', '\\''; Write-Output "$\($_.Name\) | ${size}B | keys: $keys" }')
